filter-on-desc: Ị na-enyocha kaadị na bọọdụ a. Pịa ebe a iji dezie nzacha.
advanced-filter-description: Advanced Filter allows to write a string containing following operators: == != <= >= && || ( ) A space is used as a separator between the Operators. You can filter for all Custom Fields by typing their names and values. For Example: Field1 == Value1. Note: If fields or values contains spaces, you need to encapsulate them into single quotes. For Example: 'Field 1' == 'Value 1'. For single control characters (' \\/) to be skipped, you can use \\. For example: Field1 == I\\'m. Also you can combine multiple conditions. For Example: F1 == V1 || F1 == V2. Normally all operators are interpreted from left to right. You can change the order by placing brackets. For Example: F1 == V1 && ( F2 == V2 || F2 == V3 ). Also you can search text fields using regex: F1 == /Tes.*/i
imported-member-no-account: Onye otu ebubatara — enweghị akaụntụ dabara na ya
import-board-instruction-kanboard: Mado JSON mbupụ Kanboard: ihe nwere "columns" (ma ọ bụ tasks bu column_name) na uju "tasks" (title, description, column_name, swimlane_name, date_due, owner, tags). Columns na-aghọ ndepụta, tasks na-aghọ kaadị.
import-board-instruction-deck: Mado JSON bọọdụ NextCloud Deck (bọọdụ nwere "stacks", stack ọ bụla bu "cards" ya). Stacks na-aghọ ndepụta, cards na-aghọ kaadị.
import-board-instruction-openproject: Mado JSON nchịkọta work-packages OpenProject (GET /api/v3/work_packages). Statuses na-aghọ ndepụta, work packages na-aghọ kaadị.
import-board-instruction-issues: Mado uju JSON okwu __sourceName__ (__endpoint__). Okwu na-aghọ kaadị ekewara n'ime ndepụta Open / Closed.
import-board-instruction-asana: Mado JSON mbupụ tasks Asana ({ "data": [...] } site na mbupụ Asana ma ọ bụ GET /tasks). A na-ekewa tasks n'ime akụkụ (memberships); tasks emechara na-aga na Done.
import-board-instruction-zenkit: Mado JSON mbupụ ndepụta ZenKit ({ "title", "stages":[...], "items":[...] }). Stages na-aghọ ndepụta, items na-aghọ kaadị.
import-board-instruction-trello: N'ime bọọdụ Trello gị, gaa na 'NchNhr', wee 'Ọzọ', 'Bipụta na Mbupụ', 'Bupụ JSON', ma detuo ederede ga-apụta.
import-board-instruction-csv: Tapawa n'ụkpụrụ nkewa nkewa (CSV)/ Tab kewara uru (TSV) .
import-board-instruction-jira: Mado JSON site na Jira Cloud REST API issue search (GET /rest/api/2/search), ma ọ bụ ihe { "issues": [...] } dabara ya. Statuses Jira na-aghọ ndepụta, issues na-aghọ kaadị. Na nhọrọ, tinye uju "automationRules" iji bubata iwu.
import-board-instruction-excel: Họrọ uju .xlsx ụdị WeKan (otu column dị ka mbupụ Excel: Title, Description, Status/List, Members, Labels, ụbọchị, ubi omenka). Ahịrị mbụ bụ isi.
import-board-instruction-wekan: N'ime bọọdụ gị, gaa na 'NchNhr', wee 'Export Board', ma detuo ederede na faịlụ ebudatara.
import-board-instruction-about-errors: Ọ bụrụ na ịnweta mperi mgbe ị na-ebubata bọọdụ, mgbe ụfọdụ mbubata ka na-arụ ọrụ, bọọdụ dị na ibe bọọdụ niile.
import-without-mapping-members: Bubata n'enweghị imap ndị otu (map ya emesịa)
import-json-placeholder: Tapawa data JSON gị bara uru ebe a
import-csv-placeholder: Tapawa data CSV/TSV gị bara uru ebe a
import-json-file: Ma ọ bụ họrọ faịlụ Trello JSON
import-attachments-zip: ZIP ihe ndị agbakwụnyere Trello (nhọrọ, site na Trello Card Attachments Downloader)
import-trello-json-file-hint: Otu bọọdụ Trello ebupụtara dị ka .json. Ọ bụrụ na ị chekwara igodo API na token Trello, a na-ebudata ihe ndị agbakwụnyere ya, ihe ndịna azụ bọọdụ na avatar ndị otu.
import-trello-zip-file-hint: Faịlụ .zip nwere otu ma ọ bụ ọtụtụ faịlụ bọọdụ .json na ihe ndị agbakwụnyere ha na akụkụ aha bọọdụ (site na Trello Card Attachments Downloader). A na-ebubata bọọdụ niile.

globalSearch-instructions-operator-statu: `__operator_status__:<status>` - ​​ebe *<status>* bụ otu n'ime ihe ndị a:
globalSearch-instructions-operator-has: `__operator_has__:<field>` - ​​ebe *<field>* bụ otu n'ime `__predicate_attachment__`, `__predicate_checklist__`, `__predicate_description__`, `__predicate_start__`, `__predicate_due__`, `__predicate_end__`, `__predicate_assignee__` ma ọ bụ `__predicate_member__`.  Ịtụkwasị `-` n'ihu *<field>* na-achọ enweghị uru na mpaghara ahụ (dịka `has:-due` na-achọ kaadị na-enweghị ụbọchị ruru).
globalSearch-instructions-operator-sort: `__operator_sort__:<sort-name>` - ​​ebe *<sort-name>* bụ otu n'ime `__predicate_due__`, `__predicate_created__` ma ọ bụ `__predicate_modified__`.  Maka ụdị na-agbada, tinye `-` n'ihu ụdị aha ahụ.
globalSearch-instructions-operator-limit: `__operator_limit__:<n>` - ​​ebe *<n>* bụ ọnụọgụ dị mma na-egosipụta ọnụọgụ kaadị a ga-egosipụta kwa ibe.
globalSearch-instructions-notes-1: Enwere ike ịkọwa ọtụtụ ndị ọrụ.
globalSearch-instructions-notes-2:
Ndị na-arụ ọrụ yiri nke ahụ bụ *OR*ed ọnụ.  A ga-eweghachite kaadị ndị dabara na ọnọdụ ọ bụla.
`__operator_list__:Available __operator_list__:Blocked` ga-eweghachi kaadị ndị dị na ndepụta ọ bụla aha ya bụ * akpọchiela * ma ọ bụ * Dị *.
globalSearch-instructions-notes-3: Ndị ọrụ dị iche iche bụ * NA * ed ọnụ.  Naanị kaadị ndị dabara na ndị ọrụ niile dị iche ka a na-eweghachite.  `__operator_list__:Available __operator_label__:red` na-eweghachi naanị kaadị dị na listi * Dị* nwere akara * uhie*.
globalSearch-instructions-notes-3-2: Enwere ike ịkọwa ụbọchị dị ka ọnụọgụ dị mma ma ọ bụ adịghị mma ma ọ bụ iji `__predicate_week__`, `__predicate_month__`, `__predicate_quarter__` ma ọ bụ `__predicate_year__` maka oge dị ugbu a.
globalSearch-instructions-notes-5: Na ndabara, anaghị achọ kaadị echekwara.

mongodb-compact-warning: Ịdọ aka na ntị: Compact bụ ọrụ na-egbochi nke nwere ike were ọtụtụ nkeji na database buru ibu. Na replica set, a na-akpakọ secondaries niile mbụ (n'akpaghị aka), wee bụ primary. Na replica set otu-nod eji maka oplog (nhazi Meteor a na-ahụkarị), naanị primary ka a na-akpakọ.

database-migration-description: Bugharịa data dabeere na ederede (ihe niile ma e wezụga ihe ndị agbakwụnyere na avatar, ndị na-anọ na filesystem) n'etiti MongoDB na FerretDB v1 (SQLite). Database nke ọzọ ga-arụ ọrụ ma nweta ya (ọdụ ọnọdụ: FerretDB mongodb://127.0.0.1:27018, MongoDB mongodb://127.0.0.1:27019; gbanwee ya na WEKAN_FERRETDB_URL / WEKAN_MONGODB_URL). Mgbe ọ gwụchara, tụọ MONGO_URL na database nke ọzọ ma malitegharịa WeKan (na Snap: snap set wekan database=ferretdb ma ọ bụ =mongodb).
database-migrate-to-ferretdb: Bugharịa data ederede na FerretDB v1 (SQLite)
database-migration-confirm: Detuo nchịkọta niile dabeere na ederede na __db__? Ihe ndị agbakwụnyere na avatar dị na filesystem emetụtaghị. Database ebumnuche ga-arụ ọrụ.
sandstorm-migration-description: Mgbe WeKan na-agba n'ime grain Sandstorm, a na-ebugharị database MongoDB 3 ochie ya na FerretDB v1 (SQLite) na mmalite mbụ, ma a na-ebugharị ihe ndị agbakwụnyere na avatar site na database gaa na ndekọ files/attachments na files/avatars grain. Nke a na-egosi ma mbugharị ahụ gara nke ọma na ka disk ole faịlụ database MongoDB raw ochie ka na-eji n'ime grain, ma na-enye gị ohere ihichapụ faịlụ raw ndị ahụ iji wepụta oghere.
sandstorm-delete-raw-mongodb-description: Mgbe mbugharị gachara nke ọma, data na-ebi na FerretDB na filesystem, ya mere enwere ike ihichapụ faịlụ database MongoDB 3 raw ochie iji wepụta oghere disk grain. Enweghị ike ịgbanwe nke a.
sandstorm-delete-raw-mongodb-confirm: Hichapụ faịlụ database MongoDB 3 raw iji wepụta oghere disk? A bugharịala data na FerretDB na filesystem. Enweghị ike ịgbanwe nke a.
sandstorm-raw-mongodb-deleted: Ehichapụrụ faịlụ database MongoDB raw, wepụtara
cards-loading-description: Otu bọọdụ ọ bụla si ebudata kaadị ya. Kaadị niile: a na-ebudata kaadị ọ bụla n'ime ihe nchọgharị (kacha mfe, atụmatụ niile na-arụ ọrụ, mana bọọdụ nwere ọtụtụ puku kaadị na-eziga nnukwu data na onye nlele ọ bụla). Umengwụ: ndepụta ọ bụla na-ebudata naanị kaadị a na-ahụ ugbu a (mkpuchi enweghị ngwụcha) na ọnụọgụ dị ndụ, ya mere bọọdụ buru ibu na-eji ntcheta na bandwidth pere mpe. E dobekwara site na WEKAN_CARDS_LOADING mgbanwe gburugburu.
cards-loading-lazy-note: Ntinye kaadị umengwụ bụ nnwale: ọnụọgụ kaadị na oke WIP ziri ezi, mana nlele Calendar/Table/Gantt na nhọrọ ọtụtụ na-egosi naanị kaadị ebudatara ruo ugbu a. Malitegharịa bọọdụ mepere mgbe ị gbanwesịrị nke a.
render-links-as-plain-text: Gosi njikọ dị ka ederede nkịtị
render-links-as-plain-text-description: Mgbe emenyere ya, njikọ niile (ma njikọ markdown dị ka [label](url) ma tag HTML raw <a href>) ka a na-egosi mgbe niile dị ka ederede nkịtị, a na-apịaghị ya, n'ubi ederede ọ bụla (aha bọọdụ na kaadị, nkọwa, okwu, ndetu, wdg). Nke a na-egbochi njikọ na-eduhie eze. Ntọala bụ gbanyụọ, ya mere njikọ na-anọgide na-apịa.
always-show-code-as-text: Gosi koodu niile mgbe niile dị ka ederede nkịtị
always-show-code-as-text-description: Mgbe emenyere ya, a naghị egosi ederede bara ụba dị ka markdown ma ọ bụ HTML: a na-egosi isi mmalite dum mgbe niile dị ka ederede nkịtị n'ubi ederede ọ bụla (aha bọọdụ na kaadị, nkọwa, okwu, ndetu, wdg). Nke a na-ekpughe ọdịnaya zoro ezo — okwu HTML (<!-- -->), ebe njikọ markdown, JavaScript na koodu ọ bụla ọzọ — ya mere a na-ahụ koodu niile mgbe niile, a naghị apịa ya, ọ naghị agba. Ntọala bụ gbanyụọ, ya mere a na-egosi markdown nke ọma.
disable-all-import-description: Mgbe emenyere ya, a na-agbanyụ atụmatụ mbubata niile: ibubata bọọdụ site na WeKan JSON, Trello, CSV/Excel, Jira, Kanboard, NextCloud Deck, OpenProject, GitHub, GitLab, Gitea na Forgejo, yana ịmịpụ bọọdụ. A na-ezochi nhọrọ menu mbubata, nkesa na-ajụ arịrịọ mbubata ọ bụla. Ntọala bụ gbanyụọ.
disable-all-export-description: Mgbe emenyere ya, a na-agbanyụ atụmatụ mbupụ niile: ibupụ bọọdụ dị ka WeKan JSON, CSV, Excel, Kanboard, ma ọ bụ na NextCloud Deck / OpenProject / GitHub / GitLab / Gitea / Forgejo, na mbupụ ihe agbakwụnyere otu. A na-ezochi nhọrọ menu mbupụ, nkesa na-ajụ arịrịọ mbupụ ọ bụla. Ntọala bụ gbanyụọ.
disable-import-avatars-description: Mgbe emenyere ya, a naghị ebubata avatar (foto profaịlụ onye ọrụ) ma ọlị. Nke a na-ekpuchi mbubata WeKan JSON, mbubata Trello, na mmekọrịta avatar site n'ọ ndị nnye njirimara mpụga na mbanye (LDAP, OIDC/OAuth2). A ka na-ebubata aha na data ndị ọzọ; naanị avatar ka a na-agafe. Ntọala bụ gbanyụọ.
disable-export-avatars-description: Mgbe emenyere ya, a naghị etinye avatar (foto profaịlụ onye ọrụ) mgbe a na-ebupụ bọọdụ (mbupụ WeKan JSON na CSV). A ka na-ebupụ aha njirimara na data ndị ọzọ; naanị avatar ka a na-ahapụ. Ntọala bụ gbanyụọ.
anonymize-import-users-description: Mgbe emenyere ya, ibubata bọọdụ WeKan JSON na-eji aha nnọchi ọnụọgụ (user1, user2, ...) dochie aha njirimara, aha zuru ezu na akara mmalite onye ọ bụla ebubatara, na-ahapụ avatar ya, ma na-edegharị @username ndetu (na ubi requested-by / assigned-by) n'ime ọdịnaya kaadị na okwu ebubatara. Ọ dịghị ezi njirimara onye ọrụ si na bọọdụ isi mmalite echekwara. Okwu "user" na-eso asụsụ nke onye na-ebubata. Ntọala bụ gbanyụọ.
anonymize-export-users-description: Mgbe emenyere ya, ibupụ bọọdụ na-eji aha nnọchi ọnụọgụ (user1, user2, ...) dochie aha njirimara, aha zuru ezu na akara mmalite onye ọ bụla ebupụrụ, na-ahapụ avatar ya, ma na-edegharị @username ndetu (na ubi requested-by / assigned-by) n'ime ọdịnaya kaadị na okwu. Faịlụ ebupụrụ enweghị ezi njirimara onye ọrụ. Okwu "user" na-eso asụsụ nke onye na-ebupụ. Ntọala bụ gbanyụọ.
disable-activities-description: Mgbe emenyere ya, a naghị edekọ ndetu ihe omume ma ọ naghị egosi ya ebe ọ bụla (akụkụ bọọdụ na taabụ ihe omume kaadị). Ọ dịghị akụkọ ihe onye ọ bụla mere echekwara. Ntọala bụ gbanyụọ.
disable-notifications-description: Mgbe emenyere ya, WeKan anaghị eziga mkpọsa nlele (n'ime app, email ma ọ bụ ọrụ ndị ọzọ) maka ihe omume ọ bụla. A ka nwere ike idekọ ihe omume (ma ọ bụrụ na agbanyụghịkwa ya n'elu); naanị mkpọsa ka a na-egbochi. Ntọala bụ gbanyụọ.
disable-watch-description: Mgbe emenyere ya, a na-agbanyụ atụmatụ nlele — ndị ọrụ enweghị ike ịdebanye aha na bọọdụ, ndepụta ma ọ bụ kaadị iji nweta mkpọsa, a na-ajụ mgbalị ọ bụla ịgbanwe ọkwa nlele. Ntọala bụ gbanyụọ.
backup-description: Chekwaa Ihe ndị agbakwụnyere, Avatars na/ma ọ bụ Data (nchịkọta niile dabeere na ederede na-abụghị ihe agbakwụnyere ma ọ bụ avatar). A na-eziga .zip ozugbo na nchekwa ahọpụtara — enweghị faịlụ nwa oge — dị ka backup/YYYY/MM/DD/HH_MM_SS/backup.zip, nwere YYYY_MM_DD-HH_MM_SS/attachments, /avatars na /data. Nchekwa cloud (S3/MinIO, Azure, GCS) na-eji njirimara ahaziri na taabụ nchekwa ha.
backup-restore-select-first: Họrọ backup site na ndepụta mbụ.
backup-restore-confirm: Weghachi backup ahọpụtara? A na-ede ihe ndị agbakwụnyere/avatar na filesystem na data na database dịka ọnọdụ ahọpụtara.
gcs-key-filename-description: Nhọrọ: ụzọ na faịlụ igodo JSON akaụntụ ọrụ na nkesa.
gcs-credentials-description: Nhọrọ: mado igodo JSON akaụntụ ọrụ. Hapụ ya efu iji jiri faịlụ igodo ma ọ bụ njirimara ọnọdụ.
gcs-permissions-note: Nye akaụntụ ọrụ WeKan ohere ịgụ/ide na bucket: Google Cloud Console → Cloud Storage → Buckets → bucket gị → Permissions → Grant access. N'ime "New principals", mado email akaụntụ ọrụ — uru "client_email" site na igodo JSON gị — wee họrọ ọrụ "Storage Object Admin" ma Chekwaa.
cloud-secret-keep-blank: Hapụ ya efu iji debe uru dị ugbu a.
azure-container-description: Container blob ebe a ga-echekwa faịlụ.
gcs-bucket-description: Aha bucket Cloud Storage ebe a ga-echekwa faịlụ.
s3-endpoint-menu-path: AWS: hapụ ya efu (na-eji endpoint mpaghara). Dabara S3: URL Endpoint site na MinIO / Cloudflare R2 / Backblaze B2 / Wasabi / DigitalOcean Spaces console gị.
s3-region-menu-path: AWS Console → S3 → Buckets → bucket gị → Properties → AWS Region.
s3-bucket-menu-path: AWS Console → S3 → Buckets → aha bucket gị (ma ọ bụ Create bucket → Bucket name).
s3-access-key-menu-path: AWS Console → IAM → Users → onye ọrụ gị → Security credentials → Access keys → Create access key → họrọ ihe eji eme ya 'Application running outside AWS' → Create access key. A na-egosi ya dị ka 'Access key ID'.
s3-secret-key-menu-path: Otu ihuenyo dị ka Access key ID; a na-egosi 'Secret access key' naanị otu ugboro mgbe e kere igodo — detuo ya mgbe ahụ (ma ọ bụ Download .csv).
azure-account-name-menu-path: Azure Portal → Storage accounts → akaụntụ gị → aha egosiri n'elu (ọzọkwa n'okpuru Security + networking → Access keys → Storage account name).
azure-account-key-menu-path: Azure Portal → Storage accounts → akaụntụ gị → Security + networking → Access keys → key1 → Show → Key.
azure-connection-string-menu-path: Azure Portal → Storage accounts → akaụntụ gị → Security + networking → Access keys → key1 → Connection string → Show.
azure-container-menu-path: Azure Portal → Storage accounts → akaụntụ gị → Data storage → Containers → container gị (ma ọ bụ + Container iji kee otu).
gcs-project-id-menu-path: Google Cloud Console → nhọrọ ọrụ n'elu → ID ọrụ gị (Cloud overview → Dashboard → Project info → Project ID).
gcs-bucket-menu-path: Google Cloud Console → Cloud Storage → Buckets → aha bucket gị (ma ọ bụ Create iji mee otu).
gcs-key-filename-menu-path: Ụzọ na nkesa WeKan ruo faịlụ igodo JSON akaụntụ ọrụ ebudatara (kere n'okpuru). Jiri nke a MA Ọ BỤ mado JSON n'ubi n'okpuru.
gcs-credentials-menu-path: Google Cloud Console → IAM & Admin → Service accounts → akaụntụ ọrụ gị → Keys → Add key → Create new key → JSON → Create (na-ebudata faịlụ). Mado ọdịnaya ya ebe a, ma ọ bụ chekwaa faịlụ ma debe ụzọ ya n'elu.
attachment-move-storage-azure: Bugharịa ihe agbakwụnyere na Azure Blob Storage
attachment-move-storage-gcs: Bugharịa ihe agbakwụnyere na Google Cloud Storage
gridfs-enabled-description: Jiri MongoDB GridFS maka nchekwa faịlụ
migration-stop-confirm: Ị ji n'aka na ị chọrọ ịkwụsị ọpụpụ niile?
gridfs-move-collectionfs-note: Iji hụ ihe ndị agbakwụnyere na avatar, bugharịa ha site na CollectionFS gaa na Nchekwa ọ bụla ọzọ.
s3-access-key-description: Igodo ohere AWS S3 maka nyocha
s3-bucket-description: Aha bọket S3 maka ịchekwa faịlụ
s3-enabled-description: Jiri AWS S3 ma ọ bụ MiniIO maka nchekwa faịlụ
s3-endpoint-description: URL njedebe S3 (dịka, s3.amazonaws.com ma ọ bụ minio.example.com)
s3-secret-key-description: Igodo nzuzo AWS S3 maka nyocha
s3-settings-saved: A na-echekwa ntọala S3 nke ọma
writable-path-description: Ụzọ ndekọ ntọala maka nchekwa faịlụ
comprehensive-board-migration-descriptio: Na-eme nyocha na ndozi zuru oke maka iguzosi ike n'ezi ihe data bọọdụ, gụnyere ịtụ ndepụta, ọkwa kaadị, na nhazi ụgbọ mmiri.
delete-duplicate-empty-lists-migration-d: Na-ehichapụ ndepụta oyiri efu na-enweghị nsogbu. Naanị wepu ndepụta na-enweghị kaadị NA nwee ndepụta ọzọ nwere otu aha nwere kaadị.
restore-lost-cards-migration-description: Chọta ma weghachi kaadị na ndepụta nwere swimlaneId ma ọ bụ listId na-efu. Na-emepụta ụzọ igwu mmiri 'kaadị furu efu' iji mee ka a hụ ihe niile furu efu ọzọ.
restore-all-archived-migration-descripti: Na-eweghachi ụgbọ mmiri, ndepụta na kaadị niile echekwara. Na-edozi swimlaneId ma ọ bụ listId ọ bụla na-efu na-akpaghị aka iji mee ka a hụ ihe.
fix-missing-lists-migration-description: Na-achọpụta ma rụkwaa ndepụta ndị na-efu ma ọ bụ mebiri emebi na nhazi bọọdụ.
fix-avatar-urls-migration-description: Na-emelite URL avatar maka ndị otu bọọdụ iji jiri ezigbo nchekwa ndabere wee dozie ntụnyere avatar gbajiri agbaji.
fix-all-file-urls-migration-description: Na-emelite URL mgbakwunye faịlụ niile dị na bọọdụ a iji jiri ezigbo nchekwa ndabere wee dozie ntụnyere faịlụ agbajiri.
migrations-admin-only: Naanị ndị nchịkwa bọọdụ nwere ike ịme njem
migrations-description: Gbaa nyocha na nrụzi data maka bọọdụ a. Enwere ike ịme njem ọ bụla n'otu n'otu.
run-comprehensive-migration-confirm: Nke a ga-eme njem njem zuru oke iji lelee ma dozie iguzosi ike n'ezi ihe data bọọdụ. Nke a nwere ike iwe obere oge. Gaa n'ihu?
run-delete-duplicate-empty-lists-migrati: Nke a ga-ebu ụzọ tụgharịa ndepụta ọ bụla ekekọrịtara ka ọ bụrụ listi swimlane, wee hichapụ ndepụta efu nwere ndepụta oyiri nwere otu aha nwere kaadị. Naanị ndepụta efu na-abaghị uru ka a ga-ewepụ. Gaa n'ihu?
run-restore-lost-cards-migration-confirm: Nke a ga-emepụta ụgbọ mmiri 'Kfuru efu' wee weghachi kaadị na ndepụta niile nwere swimlaneId ma ọ bụ listId na-efu. Nke a na-emetụta naanị ihe anaghị echekwaba. Gaa n'ihu?
run-restore-all-archived-migration-confi: Nke a ga-eweghachi ụgbọ mmiri, ndepụta na kaadị niile echekwara, mee ka a hụ ha ọzọ. A ga-edozi ihe ọ bụla nwere NJ na-efu efu. Enweghị ike ịmegharị nke a ngwa ngwa. Gaa n'ihu?
run-fix-missing-lists-migration-confirm: Nke a ga-achọpụta ma mezie ndepụta ndị furu efu ma ọ bụ merụrụ ure na nhazi bọọdụ. Gaa n'ihu?
run-fix-avatar-urls-migration-confirm: Nke a ga-emelite URL avatar maka ndị otu bọọdụ ka ha jiri ezigbo nchekwa azụ azụ. Gaa n'ihu?
run-fix-all-file-urls-migration-confirm: Nke a ga-emelite URL mgbakwunye faịlụ niile dị na bọọdụ a iji jiri nkwado ndabere ziri ezi. Gaa n'ihu?
restore-lost-cards-nothing-to-restore: Enweghị ụgbọ mmiri, ndepụta ma ọ bụ kaadị furu efu iji weghachi
migration-progress-note: Biko chere ka anyị na-akwaga bọọdụ gị n'ụdị kachasị ọhụrụ.
step-ensure-per-swimlane-lists: Gbaa mbọ hụ na Ndepụta Per-Swimlane
step-ensure-lost-cards-swimlane: Gbaa mbọ hụ na ịkwọ ụgbọ mmiri furu efu
conversion-info-text: A na-eme mgbanwe a otu ugboro n'otu bọọdụ ma na-emezi arụmọrụ. Ị nwere ike ịga n'ihu na-eji bọọdụ ahụ nke ọma.
converting-board-description: Ịtụgharị nhazi ụlọ maka ịrụ ọrụ ka mma. Nke a nwere ike iwe obere oge.
migration-batch-size-description: Ọnụọgụ nke mgbakwunye iji hazie na batch ọ bụla (1-100)
migration-cpu-threshold-description: Kwụsị ịkwaga mgbe ojiji CPU karịrị pasentị a (10-90)
migration-delay-ms-description: Ogbu oge n'etiti ogbe na millise seconds (100-10000)
migration-info-text: A na-eme mbugharị ọdụ data otu ugboro wee kwalite arụmọrụ sistemụ. Usoro a na-aga n'ihu n'azụ ọbụlagodi na imechi ihe nchọgharị gị.
migration-warning-text: Biko emechila ihe nchọgharị gị n'oge mbugharị. Usoro a ga-aga n'ihu na ndabere mana ọ nwere ike iwe ogologo oge iji wuchaa.
monitoring-refresh-failed: Ịmelite data nleba anya agaghị adị
search-boards-or-operations: Chọọ bọọdụ ma ọ bụ arụmọrụ...
account-locked: Akpọchiri akaụntụ nwa oge n'ihi ọtụtụ mbọ nbanye dara ada. Biko nwaa ọzọ ma emechaa.
invalid-credentials: Aha njirimara ma ọ bụ paswọọdụ ezighi ezi
username-too-short: Aha njirimara ga-abụrịrị opekata mpe mkpụrụedemede 3
account-created: Emepụtara akaụntụ! Ị nwere ike ịbanye ugbu a.
problems-summary-help: Lelee mpaghara nsogbu ị nyochara, wee pịa Kwenye iji tọgharịa ọnụọgụ nsogbu ọhụrụ ha.
